name: hogsmade-notebook
description: A modern agentic multi-domain notebook tool for software-engineering, enterprise-search, data, and product-management workflows. Powered by 13 TypeScript + 7 Python MCP servers in the Hogsmade monorepo. Every session end feeds the ori notebook; overnight drivers populate signals; the notebook is the primary UX surface across all four domains.
author: caraxesthebloodwyrm02
